calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-19-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date, having been assigned by Department 206 for Uncontested Trial and to recite Stipulation of the parties onto the record.
Judge David L. Ballati, Clerk Nancy Regas, Court Reporter Susan Lee, CSR #4280, Dept. 604.
Plaintiff's attorney Kenneth Tsang is present.
Defendant Mozar A. Katoozian is present in propria persona.
The parties agree to the following contingent agreement:
Defendant is to pay Plaintiff the sum of $7,000 or or before November 30, 2006, at which time Plaintiff will dismiss the case.
If Defendant fails to pay the amount on time, Plaintiff will reset the matter on the trial calendar.
Trial date of today is vacated.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit written stipulation.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2006 Set For Trial On Oct-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
